items.title: Syrians welcome easing of US sanctions, hope for country's economic recovery
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Syrians on the streets of Damascus Saturday welcomed the move by the Trump administration to ease sanctions imposed on the war-torn country. US President Donald Trump granted Syria sweeping exemptions from sanctions in a major first step toward fulfilling his pledge to lift a half-century of penalties on a country shattered by 14 years of civil war. (AP Video: Ghaith Alsayed)

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: 1 dead in New York sewage-boat explosion on Hudson River
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Authorities say one man has died and another was injured after an explosion on a boat carrying raw sewage that was docked on the Hudson River in New York. Read more here: https://bit.ly/4kwFtzF

#newyork #boat #news 

Picture credit: WACB-TV

items.title: Tears of joy as families reunite with Ukrainian POWs released as part of swap deal with Russia
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Hundreds more Ukrainian prisoners of war returned home on Saturday on the second day of a major exchange with Russia. Each side released 307 servicemen, a day after the first 390 were freed by both countries, according to authorities. (AP Video: Alex Babenko, production by Yehor Konovalov)

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.title: Protesters in Tel Aviv for Trump's help to end Gaza war and secure release of hostages
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Protesters took to central Tel Aviv on Saturday to join the weekly demonstration demanding the Israeli government secure a ceasefire deal and the immediate release of the remaining hostages held by Hamas in Gaza. Demonstrators held up signs against Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and urging US President Donald Trump to step in to force an agreement. (AP Video: Shlomo Mor)


Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Heli-Hydrants could be a game changer for quenching urban fires
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>One retired firefighter is offering a solution to make aerial firefighting missions easier. A Heli-Hydrant near San Diego was used nearly 40 times last fall, and officials from across Southern California to Greece, Portugal and Italy are expressing interest.

#shorts #helihydrant #wildfire #climate</article>

items.title: Trump hails West Point cadets for their accomplishments and takes credit for US military might
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>President Donald Trump used the first military commencement address of his second term Saturday to congratulate West Point cadets on their academic and physical accomplishments while veering sharply into politics, taking credit for America's military might. Read more here: https://bit.ly/4jn785p

#trump #westpoint #news

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: War-weary Palestinians gather at Gaza City charity kitchen
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>The war has left most of Gaza’s population of over 2 million dependent on humanitarian aid. International hunger experts warned that Gaza is on the brink of famine. Israel faces mounting international criticism for its offensive and pressure to let aid into Gaza amid a humanitarian crisis. Gaza has been under an Israeli blockade for nearly three months, with experts warning that many of its 2 million residents are at high risk of famine. 


Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Soldier tells AP the challenges and joys of guarding the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>For the last two years, Army Sgt. Andrew Jay has been dutifully guarding the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier at Arlington National Cemetery. He will make his final walk in June. (AP Video: Mike Pesoli).

#arlingtonnationalcemetery

items.title: Five years after murder of George Floyd, change remains a challenge in Minneapolis
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Five years after George Floyd was murdered by a Minneapolis police officer, some residents see an improved relationship with law enforcement, but scars and economic disparities remain for Black residents. (AP video: Mark Vancleave) Read more here: https://bit.ly/3ZwQ4T6

#georgefloyd #minneapolis #news

items.title: Russia and Ukraine swap hundreds more prisoners in second day of major exchange
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>The news came hours after Kyiv came under a large-scale Russian drone and missile attack that left at least 15 people injured, according to local officials. Kyiv and Moscow agreed to swap 1,000 prisoners from each side during talks in Istanbul last week.


Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.title: Israeli use of human shields in Gaza was systemic, soldiers and former Palestinian detainees tell AP
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>The Israeli military is systematically using Palestinians as human shields in Gaza, several former detainees and soldiers tell the AP, though the practice is banned by a national court decision and international law.  According to some Palestinians, it’s also happening in the occupied West Bank where the army has intensified its operations. 

The Israeli military says it prohibits using civilians as shields and has long accused Hamas of using the practice.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: SpaceX launch LIVE: Falcon 9 rocket launches 27 Starlink satellites
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Watch live as a SpaceX Falcon 9 rocket launches 27 Starlink satellites to low-Earth orbit from Vandenberg Space Force Base in California.

Credit: SpaceX
#spacex #live</article>

items.title: LIVE: Opening ceremony of the spring session of NATO Parliamentary Assembly in Dayton
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Live opening ceremony of the spring session of the NATO Parliamentary Assembly in Dayton. Representatives of NATO-aligned nations are gathering in Ohio where an end to the three-year Bosnian war was brokered three decades ago. The NATO Parliamentary Assembly is a transatlantic forum of about 300 parliamentarians from the organization's 32 member nations.

#nato #dayton #live</article>
